prevalence.source: ETA Guidelines 2023 / WHO Europe Regional Data

burden.source: WHO Global Burden of Disease 2023 / ETA

vulnerablePopulations: Individuals with family history of thyroid disease
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Elevated TSH (>4.0 mIU/L) with low free T4 for overt hypothyroidism; subclinical: elevated TSH with normal free T4 (ETA 2023 guidelines)

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: Routine screening in high-risk groups (~60-70% coverage)

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Follows ETA guidelines: TSH and free T4 measurement; ultrasound if nodular
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifelong levothyroxine replacement; dose adjustment based on TSH levels (ETA 2023)
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Disparities in access in Eastern EU; underdiagnosis in subclinical cases
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: High treatment efficacy; widespread availability of levothyroxine; strong endocrine networks
